Interface MutableObjectByteHashingStrategyMapFactory

All Known Implementing Classes:
MutableObjectByteHashingStrategyMapFactoryImpl
public interface MutableObjectByteHashingStrategyMapFactory
A factory which creates instances of type MutableObjectByteMap. This file was automatically generated from template file mutableObjectPrimitiveHashingStrategyMapFactory.stg.
Since:
11.1.
